title: HaWare Stock Pot, 12L Large Stainless Steel Stockpot with Clear Lid, 26cm Tri-Ply Bottom Cooking Pot for Pasta/Meat/Soup, Suit for Induction/Electric/Gas/Ceramic, Healthy & Easy Clean
features: HEALTHY & HEAVY DUTY: Made of high quality food grade stainless steel without any coating, No need to worry about toxic chemicals released even at high temperature, Rust-resistant and sturdy, Far superior to aluminum or non-stick coating cookware, Healthy and sturdy for long-term use

TRIPLE-PLY BASE: Specially triple-ply solid construction bottom makes it durable and practical, High grade 18/10 stainless steel inner layer ensure healthy use, With aluminum core for heating even and fast, Sturdy 18/0 stainless steel outer layer bottom makes it suitable for all your stovetops including induction, gas, electric, ceramic

VISIBLE GLASS LID: Tempered glass lid is easy to monitor the cooking process, The steam escape hole of the lid to avoid water or food boiling over, Riveted metal knob with silicone washers for insulation and easy lifting

EXQUISITE CRAFT: Ergonomic handle with firm rivets provides a secure and comfortable grip, Smooth edge without sharp spots, Mirror finish surface make it look stylish and shiny, Easy hand washing and dishwasher safe, saving your time and labor

MEASURING MARKS & LARGE CAPACITY: The 12L soup pot sized 26 x 22.3cm (Dia x H), Large and deep enough to prepare large portions of food for party guests, Built-in measuring markers for easy control of food quantity, No additional use of measuring cups, Perfect for stewing meats, cooking soup, boiling water and also good as a container to store food, Its a great addition in your kitchen
